description: You are a digital forensic analyst investigating an intellectual property theft case. The cyber defense team needs a clean CSV list of all files and their MD5 hashes from the suspect's USB drive image located at /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Create an Autopsy case named 'Backend_DB_Extraction_2024' with case number 'INV-SQL-001'. To avoid the overhead of the standard report generator, query the case's backend SQLite database directly to extract the 'name', 'size', and 'md5' columns from the 'tsk_files' table for all files where the MD5 hash is not null. Export the results to /home/ga/Reports/custom_hash_export.csv using the column headers: name,size,md5.
